name: Customer
definition: The person seeking help

name: Support Session
definition: A single customer support interaction that may include chatbot messages

name: Conversation
definition: An alternative term for Support Session; a single customer support interaction from start to finish.

name: Message
definition: A single chat entry sent by the customer

name: Human Support Agent
definition: A support operator who takes over when automation cannot or should not resolve the issue.

name: Operator
definition: An alternative term for Human Support Agent; a support operator who handles customer interactions.

name: Escalation
definition: A handoff from chatbot support to a human support agent or review queue.

name: Human Handoff Request
definition: A customer request to speak with an agent

name: One-More-Attempt Rule
definition: The chatbot should make one concise attempt to resolve the issue before escalation when a customer asks for a human

name: Policy Document
definition: A support rule or guidance document used to determine chatbot answers and action eligibility.

name: Policy Compliance
definition: The requirement that chatbot answers and actions follow the latest active support policy.

name: Policy Conflict
definition: A case where available policies are missing

name: High-Risk Issue
definition: A case involving safety

name: Self-Serve Efficacy
definition: The percentage of support sessions where the customer goes through support and does not get escalated to a human agent
column4: counting only plausibly resolved and policy-compliant outcomes.

name: Containment Quality
definition: Whether a non-escalated support session was actually resolved rather than merely deflected.

name: Same Day Repeat Contact
definition: A later support session within 24 hours from the same customer about the same or related unresolved issue.

name: Support Action
definition: A structured customer-impacting workflow such as refund

name: Proposed Action
definition: An action suggested by the chatbot before application-level policy and eligibility validation.

name: Approved Action
definition: A proposed action that passed policy

name: Denied Action
definition: A proposed action that failed policy

name: Order
definition: An ecommerce purchase that may contain one or more items and fulfillment events.

name: Item
definition: An item purchased by the customer

name: Delivery Status
definition: The current known state of an order shipment or delivery.

name: Missing Item
definition: A customer issue where one or more expected items were not received.

name: Damaged Item
definition: A customer issue where an item arrived damaged or unusable.

name: Return
definition: A customer workflow for sending an item back according to policy.

name: Refund
definition: A customer workflow for returning money or credit according to policy.

name: Bot
definition: The automated chatbot component of the support system that handles customer interactions before human escalation.

name: Clarifying Question
definition: A short question the chatbot asks when required context is missing or customer intent is ambiguous.

name: Upload Request
definition: A chatbot request for the customer to provide an image or file when it materially helps resolve the issue.

name: Fallback Response
definition: A safe response used when the chatbot cannot answer confidently or a system failure occurs.
